---
title: "📚 Dencukaay"
format:
  html:
    css:
      - ../bibliographie.css
---

<div class="biblio-container">

## 🔎 Seet
<input id="biblio-search" type="text" placeholder="Seet ci dencukaay yi…" />

## 🧭 Daytal
<div id="biblio-filters">
  <button class="filter-btn active" data-type="all">Lépp</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" data-type="journalArticle">Artikël</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" data-type="book">Téere</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" data-type="report">Rapoor</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" data-type="thesis">Dés</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" data-type="newspaperArticle">Artikël ci xibaar yi</button>
</div>

## 📄 Dencukaay yi
<div id="biblio-list">
  <p>Mi ngi yeb dencukaay yi…</p>
</div>

</div>

<script src="../zotero.js"></script>
<script src="../_private/zotero_key.js"></script>
